args.query: SELECT user_id FROM user WHERE (CASE WHEN yelping_since LIKE '%-%' THEN CAST(strftime('%Y', yelping_since::TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER) WHEN yelping_since LIKE '%,%' THEN CAST(strftime('%Y', strptime(yelping_since, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p')) AS INTEGER) ELSE CAST(strftime('%Y', strptime(yelping_since, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M')) AS INTEGER) END) = 2016;
